item.description: Messaging endpoints including sending messages, updating message approval status (pending, approved, rejected), and retrieving messages/chats

item.name: Reservations

request.description: Check if a property or hotel room is available for the specified date range. The reservable_type can be either 'property' (for vacation homes) or 'hotel_room'.

body.raw:
{
    "reservable_id": 1,
    "reservable_type": "hotel_room",
    "check_in_date": "2023-10-15",
    "check_out_date": "2023-10-20",
    "number_of_guests": 2,
    "special_requests": "I would like a room with a view if possible."
}

request.description: Create a new reservation for a property or hotel room. This will update the available_dates of the reservable item to mark the dates as reserved.

query.description: Optional: Filter by status (pending, confirmed, cancelled, completed)

request.description: Get all reservations for the authenticated customer. Can be filtered by status.
Get details of a specific reservation by ID.
Cancel a reservation. This will update the available_dates of the reservable item to mark the dates as available again.

query.description: Optional: Filter by status (pending, confirmed, cancelled, completed)
Optional: Filter by property ID
Optional: Filter by room ID

request.description: Admin endpoint to get all reservations. Can be filtered by status, property_id, and room_id.
Admin endpoint to update the status of a reservation. Status can be 'pending', 'confirmed', 'cancelled', or 'completed'. Payment status can be 'paid', 'unpaid', or 'partial'.

Create a payment intent for a reservation. This will create a pending reservation and generate a payment URL. When the payment is completed successfully, the reservation status will be updated to confirmed.

body.raw:
{
    "reservable_id": 1,
    "reservable_type": "hotel_room",
    "check_in_date": "2023-10-15",
    "check_out_date": "2023-10-20",
    "number_of_guests": 2,
    "special_requests": "I would like a room with a view if possible.",
    "payment": {
        "amount": 500.00,
        "email": "customer@example.com",
        "first_name": "John",
        "last_name": "Doe",
        "phone": "1234567890"
    }
}

request.description: Create a reservation and initiate payment in a single step. This creates a pending reservation and generates a payment URL. When payment is completed successfully, the reservation status will be updated to confirmed.
Process a refund for a reservation payment. This will update the reservation status to 'cancelled' and refund the payment.

query.description: ID of the refund to check

request.description: Check the status of a refund by its ID. Returns the current status, amount, and other details.

item.description: Reservation system endpoints for hotel rooms and vacation homes. Includes checking availability, creating reservations, viewing reservations, cancelling reservations, and admin functionality for managing reservations.

item.name: Authentication

query.description: Required if number is not provided

request.description: Request an OTP via email or phone number. You can provide either email or number.

query.description: Required if email is not provided

request.description: Request an OTP via phone number. This uses Twilio to send SMS.

exec: console.log("Auth ID saved to environment variables");

query.description: Required if number is not provided
The OTP received via email or SMS

request.description: Verify the OTP sent to email. On successful verification, it returns an auth_id that can be used for registration.

exec: console.log("Auth ID saved to environment variables");

query.description: Required if email is not provided
The OTP received via email or SMS

request.description: Verify the OTP sent to mobile number. On successful verification, it returns an auth_id that can be used for registration.
Register a new user using the new registration flow. This creates a user account and sends verification emails with OTP.
Login with existing user credentials
Get current user data

query.description: Email address to send reset password link

request.description: Request a password reset link via email

item.description: Authentication endpoints including registration, login, OTP verification, and password reset

Update user as property owner with self-management

item.name: Properties

query.description: Property classification (1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking)

request.description: Get all question fields for a specific property classification. These are custom form fields that can be used to collect additional information about properties.

formdata.description: Answer value for text, number, radio, dropdown fields
File upload for field_id 1 (if field_type is 'file')

request.description: Save answers to property question fields. For file uploads, use the field_id as the key name.

query.description: Filter by property classification (1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking)
Page number for pagination
Number of properties per page
Filter by category ID
Filter by property type (0: Sell, 1: Rent)
Filter by minimum price
Filter by maximum price
Filter by country
Filter by state
Filter by city

request.description: Get a list of properties with optional filtering by property_classification and other parameters. Supports pagination.

formdata.value: Beautiful luxury apartment with amazing views
Located in a prime area with easy access to amenities

formdata.description: 1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking
1: Available Days, 2: Busy Days (Required when property_classification is 4)
JSON array of date ranges (Required when property_classification is 4)
JSON array of date-time ranges with time in format YYYY-MM-DD:HH:MMAM/PM
JSON array of agent addons with text and price
Optional National ID or Passport document

request.description: Create a new property listing with all required fields including the new policy_data (required), weekend_commission (optional), and identity_proof (optional)

formdata.value: Updated area description with improved amenities

formdata.description: 1: Sell/Rent, 2: Commercial, 3: New Project, 4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking
1: Available Days, 2: Busy Days (Required when property_classification is 4)
JSON array of date ranges (Required when property_classification is 4)
Optional National ID or Passport document

request.description: Update an existing property with all fields including the new policy_data, weekend_commission, and identity_proof fields

request.description: Update an existing hotel property with room modifications and addon packages. Each package contains grouped addon fields with custom pricing options. Supports updating existing packages, creating new ones, and deleting packages via deleted_package_ids array.

query.description: Property classification (4: Vacation Homes, 5: Hotel Booking)

request.description: Get property taxes for a specific property classification. Returns service charge, sales tax, and city tax information for vacation homes (4) or hotel bookings (5).

item.description: Property management endpoints including the new fields: policy_data (required document except for hotel properties), weekend_commission (optional percentage except for hotel properties), identity_proof (optional image), vacation home fields (availability_type and available_dates), and hotel booking fields (refund_policy, hotel_rooms)

request.description: Get system settings

item.name: Hotel Room Types

request.description: Get all active hotel room types
Create a new hotel room type (requires authentication)
Get all hotel room types (requires authentication)
Update an existing hotel room type (requires authentication)
Delete a hotel room type (requires authentication)

item.description: Hotel room type management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting room types

item.name: Hotel Apartment Types

request.description: Get all hotel apartment types
Get all hotel apartment types (requires authentication)
Get a specific hotel apartment type by ID
Create a new hotel apartment type
Update an existing hotel apartment type
Delete a hotel apartment type

item.description: Hotel apartment type management endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting apartment types

item.name: Hotel Addon Fields

request.description: Get all active hotel addon fields with their values. This endpoint returns fields with their types and associated values including pricing options (static_price and multiply_price).

response.name: Success Response

item.description: Hotel addon fields endpoints for retrieving custom fields for hotel properties. These fields can be used to add additional options and pricing to hotel properties.

item.name: Hotel Rooms

query.description: Start date for availability search (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
End date for availability search (format: YYYY-MM-DD)
Optional: Filter by room type ID
Optional: Filter by property ID

request.description: Search for available hotel rooms based on date range, room type, and property. The endpoint handles two types of availability: 'available_days' (dates when the room is available) and 'busy_days' (dates when the room is NOT available).
Get all hotel rooms (requires authentication)
Get a specific hotel room by ID (requires authentication)

body.raw:
{
    "property_id": 1,
    "room_type_id": 1,
    "room_number": "101",
    "price_per_night": 150.00,
    "discount_percentage": 0,
    "refund_policy": "flexible",
    "description": "Standard room with one queen bed",
    "status": true,
    "availability_type": 1,
    "available_dates": [
        {
            "from": "2023-07-01",
            "to": "2023-07-15",
            "price": 150,
            "type": "open"
        },
        {
            "from": "2023-08-01",
            "to": "2023-08-15",
            "price": 150,
            "type": "open"
        }
    ],
    "weekend_commission": 5.5
}

request.description: Create a new hotel room (requires authentication). The available_dates field uses date ranges in the format [{"from":"YYYY-MM-DD","to":"YYYY-MM-DD","price":150,"type":"open"}]. The type can be 'open', 'dead', or 'reserved'. When a reservation is made, the system will split date ranges and mark the reserved dates with the reservation_id.

body.raw:
{
    "property_id": 1,
    "room_type_id": 1,
    "room_number": "101A",
    "price_per_night": 175.00,
    "discount_percentage": 5,
    "refund_policy": "flexible",
    "description": "Updated standard room with one queen bed",
    "status": true,
    "availability_type": 1,
    "available_dates": [
        {
            "from": "2023-09-01",
            "to": "2023-09-15",
            "price": 175,
            "type": "open"
        },
        {
            "from": "2023-10-01",
            "to": "2023-10-15",
            "price": 175,
            "type": "open"
        }
    ],
    "weekend_commission": 7.5
}

request.description: Update an existing hotel room (requires authentication). The available_dates field uses date ranges in the format [{"from":"YYYY-MM-DD","to":"YYYY-MM-DD","price":175,"type":"open"}]. The type can be 'open', 'dead', or 'reserved'. When a reservation is made, the system will split date ranges and mark the reserved dates with the reservation_id.
Delete a hotel room by ID (requires authentication)

item.description: Hotel room management endpoints including search, create, read, update, and delete operations. The search endpoint allows finding available rooms based on date range, room type, and property.

item.name: Addons Packages

query.description: Optional: Filter packages by property ID

request.description: Get all addons packages with their addon values. Can be filtered by property_id.
Get a specific addons package by ID with its addon values
Create a new addons package with addon values. Each addon value must reference a valid hotel addon field.
Update an existing addons package. Can update package details and addon values. Set delete_missing_values to true to remove addon values not included in the request.
Delete an addons package and its associated addon values

item.description: Addons packages endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting packages of hotel addon options. Each package contains a set of addon values that can be applied to hotel properties.

item.name: Paymob Payments

request.description: Create a payment intent with Paymob. The response includes an iframe_url that can be used to redirect the user to the Paymob payment page.
Process a refund for a completed transaction. The transaction must have a 'succeed' status to be eligible for refund.
Get payment details for a specific reservation. This returns the payment transaction details associated with the reservation.

query.description: ID of the refund to check

request.description: Check the status of a refund by its ID. Returns the current status, amount, and other details.
Process a payout to a bank card/account. This is the main payout endpoint that supports all issuer types (vodafone, etisalat, orange, aman, bank_wallet, bank_card).
Process a payout to Vodafone Cash wallet.
Process a payout to Aman. Requires first_name, last_name, and email fields.

query.description: Transaction ID to check status

request.description: Check the status of a payout transaction. Returns the current status, amount, and other details.
Cancel an Aman transaction. Only Aman transactions can be cancelled.
Check the status of multiple transactions at once. Limited to 5 requests per minute.
Get the current balance/budget of the user. Limited to 5 requests per minute.
Get the list of supported bank codes for bank card payouts.
Get the list of supported bank transaction types for bank card payouts.

query.description: Number of records per page (1-100, default: 15)
Filter by status (success, successful, failed, pending)
Filter by issuer (vodafone, etisalat, orange, aman, bank_wallet, bank_card)
Filter by start date (YYYY-MM-DD)
Filter by end date (YYYY-MM-DD)

request.description: Get paginated list of payout transactions with filters.
Webhook endpoint for Paymob to notify about payout status changes (Aman and bank transactions only). This is for reference only - it's called by Paymob, not by your application.
Webhook endpoint that Paymob calls after processing a payment. This is for reference only - it's called by Paymob, not by your application.

query.description: Whether the payment was successful (true/false)
The transaction ID

request.description: URL that users are redirected to after completing payment. This is for reference only - users are redirected here by Paymob.

item.description: Paymob payment integration endpoints for processing payments, refunds, and payouts. Includes both server-to-server API calls and user-facing payment flows.
